independent_tests.test_output_summary: Independent test verification skipped (tests not required for testing tasks)

criteria_verification.evidence: File created at tests/test_goal_md_structure.py with 20 tests across 8 test classes. File uses only stdlib + pytest (no project module dependencies).
criteria_verification.notes: File created at tests/test_goal_md_structure.py with 20 tests across 8 test classes. File uses only stdlib + pytest (no project module dependencies).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies all 9 section headings are present
criteria_verification.evidence: TestAllSectionsPresent class uses @pytest.mark.parametrize with all 9 required section headings (Goal, Source Documents, System Prompt, Generation Targets, Generation Guidelines, Evaluation Criteria, Output Schema, Metadata Schema, Layer Routing). Each heading is checked via regex pattern matching for '## <heading>' at the start of a line.
criteria_verification.notes: TestAllSectionsPresent class uses @pytest.mark.parametrize with all 9 required section headings (Goal, Source Documents, System Prompt, Generation Targets, Generation Guidelines, Evaluation Criteria, Output Schema, Metadata Schema, Layer Routing). Each heading is checked via regex pattern matching for '## <heading>' at the start of a line.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies generation targets sum to exactly 1,000
criteria_verification.evidence: TestGenerationTargets.test_targets_sum_to_1000 parses the Generation Targets markdown table, sums the Count column values, and asserts total == 1000.
criteria_verification.notes: TestGenerationTargets.test_targets_sum_to_1000 parses the Generation Targets markdown table, sums the Count column values, and asserts total == 1000.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestGenerationTargets.test_reasoning_percentage_gte_70 calculates the ratio of reasoning-type counts to total counts and asserts ratio >= 0.70.
criteria_verification.notes: TestGenerationTargets.test_reasoning_percentage_gte_70 calculates the ratio of reasoning-type counts to total counts and asserts ratio >= 0.70.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies system prompt length >= 100 characters
criteria_verification.evidence: TestSystemPrompt.test_system_prompt_min_100_chars extracts the System Prompt section and asserts len(section) >= 100.
criteria_verification.notes: TestSystemPrompt.test_system_prompt_min_100_chars extracts the System Prompt section and asserts len(section) >= 100.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies generation guidelines length >= 100 characters
criteria_verification.evidence: TestGenerationGuidelines.test_generation_guidelines_min_100_chars extracts the Generation Guidelines section and asserts len(section) >= 100.
criteria_verification.notes: TestGenerationGuidelines.test_generation_guidelines_min_100_chars extracts the Generation Guidelines section and asserts len(section) >= 100.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies output schema is valid JSON with required keys
criteria_verification.evidence: TestOutputSchema has 3 tests: test_output_schema_valid_json (parses JSON and checks it's a dict), test_output_schema_has_messages_key, and test_output_schema_has_metadata_key. JSON is extracted from ```json fenced code block via regex.
criteria_verification.notes: TestOutputSchema has 3 tests: test_output_schema_valid_json (parses JSON and checks it's a dict), test_output_schema_has_messages_key, and test_output_schema_has_metadata_key. JSON is extracted from ```json fenced code block via regex.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies evaluation criteria weights sum to ~100% (±1%)
criteria_verification.evidence: TestEvaluationCriteria.test_weights_sum_to_100_within_tolerance parses the Evaluation Criteria table, extracts Weight column values (stripping % suffix), sums them, and asserts abs(total - 100) <= 1.
criteria_verification.notes: TestEvaluationCriteria.test_weights_sum_to_100_within_tolerance parses the Evaluation Criteria table, extracts Weight column values (stripping % suffix), sums them, and asserts abs(total - 100) <= 1.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies layer routing contains behaviour and knowledge entries
criteria_verification.evidence: TestLayerRouting has 2 tests: test_layer_routing_has_behaviour and test_layer_routing_has_knowledge. Both parse the Layer Routing table and check the Layer column for the expected values.
criteria_verification.notes: TestLayerRouting has 2 tests: test_layer_routing_has_behaviour and test_layer_routing_has_knowledge. Both parse the Layer Routing table and check the Layer column for the expected values.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Test verifies no path traversal in source document patterns
criteria_verification.evidence: TestSourceDocumentsSecurity.test_no_path_traversal_in_file_patterns parses Source Documents table and asserts '..' is not in any file pattern value.
criteria_verification.notes: TestSourceDocumentsSecurity.test_no_path_traversal_in_file_patterns parses Source Documents table and asserts '..' is not in any file pattern value.
